title: Dark Green Velvet Ribbon, 10mm x 18m (3/8" x 20 Yards), Single-Faced Velvet Ribbon Roll for Gift Wrapping, Christmas Decorations, Christmas Tree Ornaments, Wreath, Bow Making
features: THE RIGHT SIZE – 1 roll of 10mm wide x 18m long (3/8" x 20yds) single-faced velvet ribbon. Perfect for Christmas projects, including gift wrapping, tree decorations, wreaths, bow making and more. Easily cut to your desired length for all your creative projects.

SINGLE-SIDED LUXURY TEXTURE – Crafted from 100% polyester, this velvet ribbon is soft and velvety to the touch. The rich dark green front offers a luxurious finish, while the smooth back ensures easy attachment and use.
SPOOL DESIGN FOR EASY USE – Neatly wound on a sturdy cardboard spool, the ribbon is easy to unwind and store without tangles, keeping your projects hassle-free.

ENDLESS CREATIVE USES – Perfect for gift wrapping, Christmas tree decorations, wreaths, bouquets, bows, velvet chokers, and festive décor. Add a warm, elegant flair to any Christmas or holiday occasion.
CUSTOMISABLE TO YOUR NEEDS – Easily cut to any length to suit your project. Whether for crafts or special events, this ribbon is the perfect finishing touch to make your creations stand out.
